channel.title: morningNewsPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: White House reviews whether VP Vance should attend events with Trump
item.description: Administration reviews protocol after dinner shooting, press secretary says.

item.title: New FBI Clinton doc shows potential pay-to-play evidence
item.description: Document suggests pay-to-play allegations and DOJ politicization.

item.title: Trump seeks Kimmel's firing over 'widow' comment about Melania
item.description: Trump demands Kimmel be fired for remark about Melania Trump being a widow.

item.title: Bitcoin nears 80k, billionaire may fuel rally
item.description: MichaelSaylor’sStrategyhaspurchased7.7 billion of Bitcoin in March and April
